output: T4 could not be fully completed in this environment. I captured baseline telemetry where possible, but only 3 instrumented components mounted (`GenerationsPaneGallery`, `TasksPane`, `ShotsPanelContent`). Observed max counts were within current budgets, so no budget bumps were needed. Full requirement (>=5 components x >=3 interactions, including lightbox/timeline surfaces) remained blocked because those surfaces did not mount under available stubbed data, and `build:dev + preview` removes DEV-gated telemetry (`import.meta.env.DEV` is false in built artifacts). I checkpointed this status in the batch file.

task_updates.executor_notes: Captured telemetry in a local stub-backed authenticated dev runtime. Observed mounted components: `GenerationsPaneGallery`, `TasksPane`, `ShotsPanelContent`; maxima: 0, 3, 0 respectively (all under budget 5). No budget increases required. Could not mount remaining required instrumented surfaces (`ImageLightbox`, `EditModePanel`, `LightboxShell`, `TimelineCanvas`, `SortableRow`, `MediaGalleryItem`, `PreviewPanel`) despite interaction attempts, so >=5 components x >=3 interactions requirement was not met. `build:dev + preview` path could not provide telemetry because DEV-gated hook/overlay are absent when `import.meta.env.DEV` is false in built artifacts.
